source.module: Core Django fundamentals - Views and URLs

topicTags: Core Django fundamentals - Views and URLs

content.problemStatement:
In this practice problem, you'll create a simple recipe finder application using dynamic URL routing. \
You'll implement a view that displays recipes based on a given ingredient. 

### Task
Your task is to complete the two `urls.py` files to set up the dynamic URL routing for the recipe finder.
- In the main project file - update `recipe_project/urls.py` to use the `include()` function
- In the app file - `recipe/urls.py` - update the URL pattern to allow for dynamic routing such that the following URLs direct to the relevant page \
https://some-url.com/recipe/tomato \
https://some-url.com/recipe/chicken \
https://some-url.com/recipe/chocolate \
https://some-url.com/recipe/cheese
